changes.before: Client is currently a sole proprietorship planning to incorporate later in the year. Interested in using Clara for collections, dispatcher‑based job assignment, appointment confirmations, review collection, and leveraging a club membership program for priority scheduling and discounts.
changes.after: Client wants Clara to mention the $115 service call fee only if the caller asks. Preferred notification email is info@benselectricsolutionsteam.com. Wants both email and SMS notifications for new calls; SMS to be sent to the main business line number. Main line will still receive texts directly; only incoming calls are forwarded to Clara.
